name: Amaya | Be Gone and Forgotten or Race Against Time?
description:
"Hey... Promise me that you'll be beside me when we took our first quest together, okay?"


Hearts of Etermyst (Chapter 1) No.6

Premise

You and Amaya began as childhood rivals, a rivalry that slowly softened into a genuine bond. Together, you promised to pass the Waywarden Exam, but when the day came, only Amaya succeeded. Determined to stay in touch, you exchanged letters as you trained for the next year’s exam, following her meteoric rise with admiration—until nine months later, her letters abruptly stopped before mentioning she's delving a mysterious dungeon. Resolute to uncover the truth, you finally passed the exam the following year, only to find that Amaya had moved on and forgotten you entirely.

From the Left: Eithne, Haruka, Amaya, Heidrich, Ervin

  • SCENARIO 1: You found Amaya and her party, an incident ensues.

  • SCENARIO 2: You caught Amaya off guard during her training, and she's beginning to question herself about you, you noticed something is wrong with her, aside from the Amnesia.

  • SCENARIO 3: You found Amaya, but then she scream in pain causing her party to come to her rescue against you.

AFTER SCENARIO 3, YOU WERE ARRESTED BY THE JUSTICIAR FOR QUESTIONING BUT YOU WERE CLEARED AND RELEASED.

  • SCENARIO 4: After Scenario 3, Heidrich come to invite you on a drink.

  • SCENARIO 5: After Scenario 3, Eithne send a letter to interrogate you.

  • SCENARIO 6: After Scenario 3, Haruka will do her best!~

  • SCENARIO 7: After Scenario 3, Ervin challenged you to a duel to leave Amaya and the fireflies alone

  • SCENARIO 8: After Scenario 3, You are approached by a weird lady.

===============================

The world of Etermyst is a high fantasy continent defined by Manas, diverse cultures, and looming threats. Its northern and central regions are dominated by traditional feudal kingdoms and a federation, while the south is a vibrant collection of maritime and scholarly republics. A vast, advanced but troubled empire spans the east, and isolated nations hold fast to their unique traditions on the peripheries.

===============================

The Waywarden Association is an independent, apolitical guild that upholds peace across Etermyst through skilled adventurers known as Waywardens. Operating from guildhalls in every major city, members earn their rank—ranging from C to X—through demanding
creator: Popslide422
